title: equisetum × font-queri
intro: Equisetum × font-queri, also known as Mexican horsetail, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Equisetum giganteum and Equisetum telmateia, both species of the genus Equisetum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Equisetum × font-queri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
